title: Build an app from your phone in AI Studio
summary: A tutorial on using Google AI Studio to build a mobile-browser-based image-generation app with voice commands and the Nano Banana API. The demo shows Gemini generating code in real time to create a plushie app without local software installation.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building a mobile-browser image-generation app entirely in Google AI Studio, with no local software installation required. The demo combines voice commands and the Nano Banana API, with Gemini generating the app's code in real time to produce a plushie-generating app. It shows that AI Studio can turn spoken input into working browser-based applications, covering code generation and voice input as the core capabilities.
